common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

login.title: Welcome back.
login.intro: Sign in with your email and password to review project health reports.
login.errorInvalid: Email or password was not recognized.

signup.title: Set up your account.
signup.intro: Create your account, then an administrator will grant you access to the project-health dashboard.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password.
forgotPassword.intro: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sentDetail: If an account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password.
resetPassword.intro: Set a new password to finish resetting.
resetPassword.doneDetail: You can sign in with your new password now.
resetPassword.errorInvalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.errorGeneric: We couldn't reset your password. Please try again.

pendingApproval.title: Waiting for approval.
pendingApproval.intro: Your account is created but an administrator hasn't granted you access to the project-health dashboard yet. Once they do, this page will redirect automatically — feel free to leave it open.
pendingApproval.crossAppNote: If you already use another Shema app, we recognized your account and submitted your access request on your behalf.

notFound.title: We couldn't find that page.
notFound.intro: The link may have been moved or removed.

welcome.mobileLede: A guided reflection — in your own words.
welcome.desktopLede: This is a guided reflection, not a test. We'll ask open questions and listen. There are no wrong answers — just your team, in your own words, telling us how the work is really going.
welcome.reassureVoiceLabel: Speak or type, whichever feels natural
welcome.reassureVoiceDetail: One person speaks for the team. Others may join in.
welcome.reassureCareLabel: What you share stays with your team
welcome.reassureCareDetail: The team report is yours immediately.
welcome.sectionTitle: Tell us a little about your team.
welcome.pauseNote: You can pause and return at any time.
welcome.blessing: "May your words be heard, and the work of your hands prosper."

interview.placeholder: Speak or type your team's response…
interview.listeningHint: Listening · speak naturally, we'll wait for you to finish.
interview.typeHint: Tip: tap the mic to speak, or just type. Either is welcome.
interview.sessionExpired: Your interview session has timed out. Please start over to continue.

completion.inProgressDetail: Take a breath. We're putting your team's words together.
completion.readyDetail: Thank you for the care you brought to this conversation.

teamReport.mobileLede: What we heard from {project} — in your own words.
teamReport.desktopLedeBefore: A reflection from your conversation about
teamReport.desktopLedeAfter: . What follows is what we heard — in your own words.
teamReport.closingFooter: OBT Project Health · in conversation with your team
teamReport.shareNote: This report stays with your team. Share it however feels right — print it, read it aloud, or sit with it for a while.

adminSignIn.title: Welcome back.
adminSignIn.intro: Enter your email and we'll send you a one-time sign-in link.
adminSignIn.notAuthorized: That email isn't authorized yet. Please ask an existing admin to invite you.
adminSignIn.sentDetailBefore: We sent a sign-in link to
adminSignIn.sentDetailAfter: . Open it on this device to continue.
adminSignIn.demoNote: (For this demo we'll open it for you in a moment.)
adminSignIn.inviteOnly: Don't have a supervisor account? Ask an existing admin to invite you — access is invitation-only.
adminSignIn.supervisorArea: OBT Project Health Assessment · Supervisor area

adminDashboard.title: How the teams are doing.
adminDashboard.intro: Recent conversations with translation teams across the network. Open a report to see what they shared — and what to think about next.
adminDashboard.footerNote: Each interview is one team's story. Read with care.

adminReport.qualityTitle: How well we heard the team
adminReport.footerNote: The team's version of this conversation lives under "Team report" — supportive language, no scores.

inviteAdmin.title: Bring someone you trust.
inviteAdmin.intro: Supervisors can read team reports and the quantitative admin view. We'll send them a one-time link to set up access.
inviteAdmin.sent: Invitation sent. They'll receive a magic link shortly.
inviteAdmin.duplicate: That email is already authorized — no need to invite again.
inviteAdmin.invalid: That doesn't look like a valid email address.
inviteAdmin.footerNote: Trust travels with people, not with permissions. Invite carefully.

pacingHint.sufficient: You have enough to finish whenever you're ready.
pacingHint.listening: We're still listening for a fuller picture.
